title: SHARE CENTER - 211info
text: SHERWOOD FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER SHARE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources and support for families in need. Offers the use of computers and office equipment for job search and accessing community resources. Gives referrals to parenting classes. 21920 SW Sherwood Boulevard Sherwood School District Office Sherwood, OR 97140 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm, during the school year. Summer hours by appointment only. Email (503) 825-5087 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 825-5087 Katie Bouska [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Sherwood SITE HOURS: By appointment TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the north side of building toward the back. Follow the signs to the entrance. Services: Children's Clothing Family Support Centers/Outreach Public Internet Access Sites Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY RESOURCE COORDINATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
